scanner.scanHint: Ayikwazi ukufunda ikhodi ye-QR — zama ukuthumela kabusha noma usondele
scanner.cameraPermissionDenied: Imvume yekhamera yenqatshiwe — thepha ukuze uvule izilungiselelo

app.title: Ghost Auth
app.subtitle: Isiqinisekisi se-open-source
app.refreshCodesFailed: Yehlulekile ukuvuselela amakhodi — hlola ukuthi uhlelo lunokufinyelela kwisitoreji
app.dataRecoveredWarning: Idatha ye-akhawunti ibingafundeki futhi isigcinwe ngesipele. Ngenisa isipele ukuze ubuyisele ama-akhawunti akho.

accountCard.srHint: Cindezela u-E ukuze uhlele, u-Delete ukuze ususe

addAccount.title: > Engeza i-akhawunti
addAccount.scanQrDesc: Sebenzisa ikhamera ukuskena ikhodi ye-QR yokuqinisekisa
addAccount.scanFromPageDesc: Khetha ikhodi ye-QR ephepheni lewebhu lamanje
addAccount.invalidQr: Ikhodi ye-QR engalungile — bekulindeleke i-otpauth:// URI
addAccount.importFromAppDesc: Skena ikhodi ye-QR noma ngenisa ifayela lokuthumela ngaphandle
addAccount.uploadQrImageDesc: Khetha isithombe-skrini noma isithombe esinekodi ye-QR

crashReportingInfo.title: > Ukubika kokuwa
crashReportingInfo.whyDesc: Imibiko yokuwa isisiza ukuthola nokulungisa izinkinga zokuzinza. Yiyona ndlela kuphela esazi ngayo ngokuwa okwenzekayo kudivayisi yakho.
crashReportingInfo.included2: Uhlobo lokuwa nendawo yekhodi (umsebenzi, ifayela, umugqa)
crashReportingInfo.included3: Izehlakalo zokuxwayisa/amaphutha ezingu-20 zokugcina ezihlanzwe ngaphambi kokuwa
crashReportingInfo.neverIncluded1: Izimfihlo ze-TOTP, ama-URI e-otpauth, noma amakhodi amanje
crashReportingInfo.destinationDesc: Imibiko ithunyelwa kuseva yethu siqu. Akukho amasevisi angaphandle athola noma yimiphi imininingwane.
crashReportingInfo.retentionDesc: Imibiko yokuwa isuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kwezinsuku ezingu-30.
crashReportingInfo.disableDesc: Cisha kuZilungiselelo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi. Lokhu kumisa ngokushesha konke okuthathwayo futhi kususe noma yimiphi imibiko elindile.

icloudSync.title: > Ukuvumelanisa kwe-iCloud
icloudSync.description: Vumelanisa ngokuzenzakalela isikhwama sakho phakathi kwamadivayisi e-Apple nge-iCloud.
icloudSync.howItWorksDesc: Ama-akhawunti akho ayabethelwa kule divayisi ngaphambi kokugcinwa ku-iCloud. Ukhiye wobethelo okhethekile wabiwa phakathi kwamadivayisi akho nge-iCloud Keychain.
icloudSync.whatIcloudSeesDesc: Ifayela elibethelwe elingabonakali. I-Apple ayikwazi ukufunda amagama ama-akhawunti akho, izimfihlo noma noma yidiphu enye.
icloudSync.tradeoffDesc: Ukuvumelanisa kwe-LAN kugcina idatha ngokuphelele kunethiwekhi yakho yendawo. Ukuvumelanisa kwe-iCloud kwethula i-Apple njengesendlalelo sokuthutha sefayela elibethelwe.
icloudSync.notAvailable: I-iCloud ayitholakali. Ngena ngemvume ku-iCloud ezilungiselelweni zedivayisi yakho.
icloudSync.enabledToast: Ukuvumelanisa kwe-iCloud kuvuliwe — amakhodi akho abethelwe futhi avumelaniswe phakathi kwamadivayisi akho
icloudSync.restoredToast: {count, plural, one {i-akhawunti e-#} other {ama-akhawunti angu-#}} abuyiselwe ku-iCloud
icloudSync.syncedToast: {count, plural, one {i-akhawunti e-#} other {ama-akhawunti angu-#}} avumelanisiwe ku-iCloud

help.title: Usizo
help.introDesc: Konke okudingeka ukukwazi ngokuvumelanisa, izipele, nokugcina ama-akhawunti akho ephephile.
help.syncDesc: I-Ghost Auth ivumelanisa amakhodi akho phakathi kwamadivayisi ngokuxhumana okuqondile okubethelwe. Amadivayisi omabili kumele abe kunethiwekhi efanayo.
help.syncStep1: Edivayisini enezimfihlo onokuzabelana ngazo, iya ku-Izilungiselelo → Vumelanisa kusuka kule divayisi. Lokhu kuzobonisa ikhodi ye-QR.
help.syncStep2: Edivayisini ofuna ukwamukela amakhodi kuyo, iya ku-Izilungiselelo → Vumelanisa kule divayisi bese uskena ikhodi ye-QR.
help.syncNote: Ukuvumelanisa akwenzeki ngokuzenzakalelayo. Njalo uma wengeza, uhlela, noma ususa ama-akhawunti, udinga ukuvumelanisa futhi ukugcina amadivayisi akho amanye ebuyekeziwe.
help.importDesc: Ungakwazi ukungenisa amakhodi akho akhona kusuka kuma-app okuqinisekisa njenge-Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, nokunye.
help.importStep1Title: Isinyathelo 1 — Thumela kusuka ku-app yakho yamanje
help.importStep1: Ku-app yakho yokuqinisekisa yamanje, bheka inketho yokuthumela noma yokudlulisa. Lokhu ngokuvamile kukhiqiza ikhodi ye-QR noma ifayela lokuthumela elinama-akhawunti akho.
help.importStep2: Iya ku-Izilungiselelo → Ngenisa kusuka ku-app. Skena ikhodi ye-QR evela ku-app yakho endala, noma ukhethe ifayela lokuthumela. Ama-akhawunti akho azongezwa ku-Ghost Auth.
help.backupExportDesc: Iya ku-Izilungiselelo → Thumela isipele ukulondoloza ifayela elibethelwe elinayo yonke ama-akhawunti akho. Gcina leli fayela endaweni ephephile ebethelwe oyikhethile — njengomlawuli wamagama emfihlo, idrayivu ebethelwe, noma isitoreji seklaudi esiphephile.
help.backupImportDesc: Iya ku-Izilungiselelo → Ngenisa isipele bese ukhetha ifayela lakho lesipele olithumele ngaphambilini. Ama-akhawunti akho azobuyiselwa.
help.backupNote: Sincoma kakhulu ukuthumela izipele njalo, ikakhulukazi ngaphambi kokwenza izinguquko kuma-akhawunti akho. Izipele njengamanje zigcinwe ngokwendawo — azihostwe kumaseva e-Ghost Auth. Ama-akhawunti abasebenzisi nezipele ezizenzakalelayo zingaba khona esikhathini esizayo.
help.forgotPinDesc1: Uma ukhohlwe i-PIN yakho, ungasebenzisa enye yamakhodi okubuyisela anikwa ngenkathi usetha i-PIN yakho okokuqala. Ikhodi ngayinye yokubuyisela ingasetshenziswa kanye kuphela.
help.forgotPinDesc2: Uma ungasenawo amakhodi okubuyisela, akukho indlela yokuvula uhlelo lokusebenza. Inketho yakho ekuphela kwayo ukufaka kabusha i-Ghost Auth bese ungenisa ifayela lesipele elinezinhla zakho zangaphambilini.
help.lostDeviceDesc: Uma ulahlekelwe yidivayisi yakho, faka i-Ghost Auth edivayisini entsha bese ungenisa ifayela lesipele. Uma ubuvumelanise ama-akhawunti akho kwelinye idivayisi, ungavumelanisa nokusuka kulelo divayisi.
help.accessWarning: I-Ghost Auth ayinawo ama-akhawunti abasebenzisi futhi ayinaso isitoreji seseva. Uma ulahlekelwa ukufinyelela okuphelele ku-app futhi ungenalo ifayela lesipele noma idivayisi evumelanisiwe, ukubuyisela amakhodi akho e-TOTP akunakwenzeka. Thumela izipele njalo futhi uzigcine ngokuphephile.

about.title: > Mayelana
about.heading: Ghost Auth
about.description: I-Ghost Auth isiqinisekisi samahhala, se-open-source. Izimfihlo zakho zibethelwe ngokwendawo futhi ziphuma edivayisini yakho kuphela uma uzithumela noma uvumelanisa ngokuzithandela.

syncInitiate.generateQrDesc: Bonisa ikhodi ye-QR ukuze elinye idivayisi liskene

syncToExtension.invalidQr: Akuyona ikhodi ye-QR yokuvumelanisa ye-Ghost Auth efanele

syncJoin.title: > Vumelanisa kule divayisi
syncJoin.scanQrDesc: Skena ikhodi ye-QR eboniswe kwelinye idivayisi
syncJoin.invalidSyncQr: Ikhodi ye-QR engalungile — akuyona ikhodi yokuvumelanisa ye-Ghost Auth
syncJoin.missingSyncData: Ikhodi ye-QR yokuvumelanisa engalungile — idatha yokuxhumana ayikho
syncJoin.badPort: Ikhodi ye-QR yokuvumelanisa engalungile — iphothi engalungile
syncJoin.allowPublicHostFull: Vumela amakheli omphakathi (okuthuthukile). Okuzenzakalelayo inethiwekhi yendawo kuphela.
syncJoin.generateQrDesc: Bonisa ikhodi ye-QR ukuze elinye idivayisi liskene

exportQr.title: > Thumela amakhodi e-QR
exportQr.accountsInBatch: {count, plural, one {i-akhawunti e-#} other {ama-akhawunti angu-#}} kule khodi ye-QR
exportQr.description: Skena nge-app yokuqinisekisa enye ukuze ungenise lama-akhawunti
exportQr.riskWarning: Ukuthumela amakhodi e-QR kuveza izimfihlo ze-TOTP. Noma ubani oskena la makhodi e-QR angakhiqiza amakhodi akho okungena.
exportQr.acknowledgeRequired: Sicela uqinisekise ukuvuma ubungozi bokukhipha kuqala.

biometricPrompt.title: Ukuvula nge-biometric
biometricPrompt.description: Sebenzisa i-Face ID noma umunwe ukuvula i-Ghost Auth ngokushesha
biometricPrompt.permissionDeniedDesc: Ukuze usebenzise ukuvula nge-biometric, vumela i-Ghost Auth ukuthi ifinyelele ku-Face ID noma umunwe ezilungiselelweni zedivayisi yakho.

networkPermission.title: Ukufinyelela kwenethiwekhi yendawo
networkPermission.description: I-Ghost Auth ivumelanisa ama-akhawunti ngenethiwekhi yakho yendawo. Ukuze uxhumeke namadivayisi aseduze, uzocelwa ukuba unikeze ukufinyelela kwenethiwekhi.
networkPermission.deniedDesc: Ukufinyelela kwenethiwekhi kunqatshiwe. Ukuze uvumelanise, vumela ukufinyelela kwenethiwekhi yendawo ye-Ghost Auth kumasethingi edivayisi yakho.
networkPermission.noNetworkDesc: Xhuma kunethiwekhi ye-Wi-Fi noma i-LAN ukuze uvumelanise phakathi kwamadivayisi.

recoveryCodes.title: Amakhodi okubuyisela
recoveryCodes.description: Londoloza la makhodi endaweni ephephile. Awasoze aboniswa futhi. Ikhodi ngayinye ingasetshenziswa kanye kuphela.

errors.issuerTooLong: Igama lomkhiphi lide kakhulu (kuvunyelwe abalingiswa abangu-255)
errors.invalidAlgorithm: I-algorithm kufanele ibe yi-SHA1, SHA256, noma SHA512
errors.invalidDigits: Izinombolo kufanele zibe ngu-6 noma u-8
errors.invalidPeriod: Isikhathi kufanele sibe phakathi kwe-15 ne-120 amasekhondi
errors.storageUnavailable: Isitoreji asitholakali — sicela uqale kabusha i-app
errors.authUnavailable: Isimo sokuqinisekisa asitholakali — sicela uqale kabusha i-app
errors.pinUnavailable: Ukuqinisekisa i-PIN akutholakali — sicela uqale kabusha i-app
errors.syncAlreadyActive: Iseshini yokuvumelanisa seyisebenza kakade — yikhansele kuqala
errors.recoveryUnavailable: Ukuqinisekisa ikhodi yokubuyisela akutholakali — sicela uqale kabusha i-app
errors.tooManyAttempts: Imizamo eminingi kakhulu. Zama futhi ngemva kwamasekhondi angu-{seconds}.
errors.invalidQrFormat: Ikhodi ye-QR noma ifomethi ye-URI engalungile
errors.systemClockError: Iphutha lewashi yesistimu — hlola usuku nesikhathi sedivayisi yakho
errors.backupFileTooLarge: Ifayela lesipele likhulu kakhulu (kuvunyelwe okungu-50 MB)

setup.heading: > Ghost Auth
setup.description: Setha iphasiwedi enkulu ukuze ubethele isafe yakho
setup.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe nezinhlamvu okungenani ezingu-8
setup.passwordNeedsNumber: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe nenombolo okungenani eyodwa
setup.passwordNeedsSpecial: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe nohlamvu olukhethekile okungenani olulodwa

settings.autoLockNeverDesc: Isafe ihlala ivulekile kuze kuvale isiphequluli
settings.autoLockDesc: Isafe iyazikhiya ngemva kwemizuzu engu-{minutes} yokungasebenzi
settings.passwordlessEnabledHint: Thepha ukuze uvimbe ukuvula ngaphandle kwephasiwedi
settings.passwordlessWarningDesc: Lokhu kuzogcina ukhiye wesafe ngaphandle kokubethela. Noma ubani ofinyelela iphrofayili yakho yesiphequluli angabona wonke ama-akhawunti nezimfihlo.
settings.lockPinDesc: Khiya manje futhi udinge i-PIN ukuze uvule kabusha
settings.lockPasswordDesc: Khiya manje futhi udinge iphasiwedi ukuze uvule kabusha
settings.syncFromDeviceDesc: Xhuma kukhompyutha noma ifoni ngenethiwekhi yangaphakathi

sync.title: > Vumelanisa kusuka kudivayisi
sync.instructions: Vula i-Ghost Auth kudivayisi yakho enye, yana ezilungiselelweni, bese uthepha "sync to extension". Faka ikhodi yokuvumelanisa nekheli eliboniswa lapho.

qrSync.title: > Ukuvumelanisa nge-QR
qrSync.instructions: Skena le khodi ye-QR nge-app ye-Ghost Auth efonini yakho, bese unamathisela ikheli.
qrSync.uriInvalid: I-clipboard ayinalo ikheli le-QR sync le-Ghost Auth

help.title: > Usizo
help.syncingDesc: Vumelanisa ama-akhawunti akho kusuka ku-app ye-Ghost Auth yekhompyutha noma yefoni ngokuxhuma okuqondile okubethelwe. Womabili amadivayisi kumele abe kunethiwekhi efanayo.
help.syncingStep: Ku-app yakho, yana Izilungiselelo → Vumelanisa kusuka kule divayisi. Bese kulesi singezo, yana Izilungiselelo → Vumelanisa kusuka kudivayisi bese ufaka ikhodi yokuvumelanisa.
help.syncingNote: Ukuvumelanisa kwenziwa ngesandla — phinda njalo uma wengeza noma ushintsha ama-akhawunti ku-app.
help.backupsExport: Thumela ifayela yesipele ye-.ghostauth ebethelwe kusuka Izilungiselelo → Thumela isipele. Igcine endaweni ephephile.
help.backupsImport: Ngenisa isipele kusuka Izilungiselelo → Ngenisa isipele. Izipele ziyahambisana phakathi kwe-app nesingezo.
help.masterPasswordDesc: Isafe yakho ibethelwe ngephasiwedi enkulu. Le phasiwedi ayiphumi esipheqululini sakho futhi ayinakubuyiswa.
help.masterPasswordWarning: Uma ukhohlwa iphasiwedi yakho enkulu, uzodinga ukufaka kabusha isingezo bese ungenisa isipele noma uvumelanise kusuka ku-app.
help.pinRecoveryDesc: Ukukhiya nge-PIN okukhethekayo kwengeza isendlalelo sokuvula ngokushesha phezu kwephasiwedi enkulu. Amakhodi okubuyisa anikezwa uma usetha i-PIN — wagcine endaweni ephephile.
help.pinRecoveryNote: Uma ukhohlwa i-PIN yakho futhi ungenamakhodi okubuyisa, khiya isafe ngesandla (vala bese uvula kabusha isiphequluli) bese usebenzisa iphasiwedi yakho enkulu esikhundleni.
help.losingAccessDesc: I-Ghost Auth ayinama-akhawunti abasebenzisi noma isitoreji seseva. Uma ulahlekelwa ukufinyelela kokubili isingezo ne-app ngaphandle kwefayela yesipele, ukubuyisa amakhodi akho e-TOTP akunakwenzeka. Thumela izipele njalo.

backupImport.imported: Kungeniswe {count, plural, one {i-akhawunti e-#} other {ama-akhawunti angu-#}}
backupImport.accountsFound: {count, plural, one {i-akhawunti e-#} other {ama-akhawunti angu-#}} atholakele. Amakhophi afanayo azokwedlulwa.

syncChoice.title: > Vumelanisa
syncChoice.receiveDesc: Vumelanisa ama-akhawunti kusuka kwesinye isixhobo kuso lesi
syncChoice.sendDesc: Vumelanisa ama-akhawunti kusuka kulesi sixhobo kwesinye
